title: loasa illapelina var. genuina
intro: Loasa illapelina var. genuina, also known as the Chilean Loasa, is a perennial plant species in the Loasaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
